name: event-management-system
description: Event Management System - Full Stack Monorepo

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd Frontend && npm install && cd ../Backend/node-backend && npm install && cd ../..
scripts.start-project: concurrently "npm run start:spring" "npm run start:dotnet" "npm run start:node" "npm run start:frontend" --names "Spring,ASP.NET,Node,Frontend" --prefix "[{name}]" --kill-others-on-exit
scripts.build-all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:spring && npm run build:dotnet && npm run build:node
scripts.build:node: cd Backend/node-backend && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/db.js
